fabricated_divergences.quote: German media (DW) concentrates on the French central government's logistical and security response, whereas French media (France 24, RFI) foreground the local political outcome and quote New Caledonian actors directly.
fabricated_divergences.why_unsupported: The analysis for France 24 (article 1) lists an empty actors_quoted array — it quotes no actors at all, let alone New Caledonian ones. Only RFI quotes a New Caledonian actor (Sonia Backes). Grouping France 24 with RFI as 'French media' that 'quote New Caledonian actors directly' misrepresents France 24, which quotes no one.
